case_title: SOJOURN PROPERTIES, INC. VS. DAVID OXFORD ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOJOURN PROPERTIES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OXFORD, DAVID THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1105 POST ST., NO. 305, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT OXFORD, DAVID
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOJOURN PROPERTIES, INC. SERVED DEC-01-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT OXFORD, DAVID
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOJOURN PROPERTIES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT OXFORD, DAVID DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT OXFORD, DAVID
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOJOURN PROPERTIES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT OXFORD, DAVID
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $42.86. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOJOURN PROPERTIES, INC.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT OXFORD, DAVID
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JUL-14-2025.
